**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Lifanghe Intelligent System Engineering Co., Ltd. provides an excellent, highly typical case of a 'weak-current engineering contractor team misjudged as a major electronic manufacturing plant.' The system has forcibly erased the underlying fake consumer electronics production capacity data triggered by Apple Inc. The official registry system, simply because its name contains 'Intelligent System' and involves 'computer software and hardware R&D,' blindly categorized it into the heavy-asset 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing.' However, the forensic engine directly retrieved its baseline parameters: this is an old micro-enterprise established back in 2012, with a paid-in capital of only 505,000 RMB, and its 2024 insured headcount is a mere '2 people.' Its registered address is '4th Floor, Building 2' in Moling Sub-district, Jiangning District; this is an ordinary commercial office floor with absolutely no possibility of accommodating an electronic device assembly line. The most crucial evidence lies in its extremely honest business license: 'intelligent system engineering, lighting and audio engineering, network engineering, weak-current engineering design, and installation.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an electronic factory capable of manufacturing mobile phones or computer accessories, but a pure 'Micro Weak-Current & AV Engineering Contractor.' The boss (Dong Xiangsheng), leading one employee (or acting as a contractor), primarily takes on small engineering projects such as lighting and audio installation for KTVs and conference rooms, or network wiring and surveillance installation for offices.
